steps.title: Relate weight and volume
steps.content: The boulder weighs $150$ pounds per cubic foot, so weight equals $150$ times volume.

steps.title: Scale the volume bounds
steps.content:
The volume is between $14.2$ and $18.2$ cubic feet. Multiplying all parts by positive $150$ keeps the inequality directions the same:
$$150(14.2)The answer is C.
